name: Vanilla Wafer Crumb Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a 9-inch pie plate by rubbing the inside, bottom, and sides with 1 teaspoon of the melted margarine; set aside.
2. Crush the vanilla wafers to make very fine crumbs (about 1 1/2 cups).
3. Place the crumbs in a large bowl.
4. Combine the vanilla extract and melted margarine.
5. Drizzle the mixture over the crumbs.
6. Mix thoroughly with a blending fork to ensure all is well blended.
7. Remove about 2 tablespoons of the crumb mixture and set aside for garnish if desired.
8. With the back of a large spoon, press the remaining crumbs evenly onto the bottom and sides of the prepared pie pan.
9. Chill in the refrigerator for 2 hours or longer before filling.
Food exchanges per serving crust only: 1 starch exchange plus 1 fat exchange
